title: CBDT Extends Due Date for Issuance of TDS Certificates for Q3 FY25-26
content:
# CBDT Extends Due Date for Issuance of TDS Certificates for Q3 FY25-26

Ek important update hai for all deductors! The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne TDS Certificates issue karne ki due date extend kar di hai for the third quarter of Financial Year 2025-26 (i.e., October to December 2025).

*   **Quarter Applicable:** Q3 FY25-26 (for the quarter ending December 31, 2025).
*   **Original Due Date:** Normally, TDS certificates are to be issued within 15 days of filing the quarterly TDS statement. For Q3, the original due date would have been February 15, 2026.
*   **New Due Date:** The new extended due date for issuing these certificates is **March 31, 2026**.
*   **Reason for Extension:** This extension has been granted due to technical glitches faced by deductors on the e-filing portal, which caused difficulties in generating and issuing certificates within the original timelines.
*   **Circular Details:** This relief comes vide CBDT Circular No. 02/2026 dated March 26, 2026. Certificates issued within this extended period will be considered as valid and issued within the prescribed time.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/latest-news/circulars-orders)

*Published on: 30 March 2026*
